meta.title: {{platformName}} — Modern Digital Banking
meta.description: {{platformName}} is a modern digital banking platform. Send money, create cards, manage beneficiaries, and apply for loans — all in one secure place.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your banking dashboard.
login.registered: Account created successfully! Sign in to continue.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start managing your finances in minutes.
register.name: Full Name

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.sent: Password reset link sent! Check your email inbox.

branding.description: Manage your finances with confidence. Send money, create cards, and track every transaction — all in one place.

home.heroSubtitle: Send money globally, create virtual cards, manage beneficiaries, and track every transaction — all from one secure dashboard.
home.featuresSubtitle: From instant transfers to virtual cards, {{platformName}} gives you all the tools to manage your money with confidence.
home.feature1Desc: Send money to any beneficiary worldwide. Add recipients once, transfer anytime with real-time status tracking.
home.feature2Desc: Create VISA or Mastercard virtual cards instantly. Perfect for online payments, subscriptions, and ATM withdrawals.
home.feature3Desc: Verify your identity once and unlock the full power of your account. Fast review, minimal documents.
home.feature4Desc: Save and organize your transfer recipients with full banking details. No re-entering info every time.
home.feature5Desc: Calculate monthly payments and total repayment before applying. Transparent terms, no hidden fees.
home.feature6Desc: Stay informed on every transaction, KYC update, and account event — in your dashboard and via email.
home.step1Desc: Sign up with your name and email. A unique bank account number is generated instantly.
home.step2Desc: Complete KYC verification by uploading your ID and a selfie. Approval is fast and straightforward.
home.step3Desc: Send transfers, create virtual cards, add beneficiaries, and manage your finances from your dashboard.
home.testimonial1: {{platformName}} made managing my international payments a breeze. I set up beneficiaries once and now sending invoices takes seconds.
home.testimonial2: The virtual cards are a game-changer. I can create separate cards for each subscription and track spending clearly.
home.testimonial3: KYC was approved within hours. From sign-up to sending my first transfer took less than a day. Incredibly smooth.
home.ctaFinalTitle:
Your money deserves better.
Open your account today.
home.ctaFinalSubtitle: No hidden fees, no paperwork, no waiting. Just modern banking that puts you in control.

services.title: Everything your money needs.
services.subtitle: From daily banking to global transfers, explore the full suite of tools designed to simplify your financial life.
services.bankingDesc: Open an account instantly with a unique account number. Track your balance in real time, receive funds immediately, and manage everything from a single dashboard.
services.bankingF1: Unique account number generated on sign-up
services.cardsDesc: Create virtual cards in seconds. Use them for online purchases, manage separate budgets for different spending categories, or withdraw at ATMs.
services.transfersDesc: Transfer funds to your saved beneficiaries with full transparency. Every transaction is tracked through a clear status flow.
services.loansDesc: Use our loan simulator to calculate monthly payments before applying. Know exactly what you'll pay — no surprises.
services.ctaSubtitle: Open your account today and discover all these features first-hand.

about.title:
Built for the way
people bank today.
about.subtitle: We believe banking should be simple, transparent, and accessible to everyone — no matter where you are.
about.storyP1: {{platformName}} was created out of a simple frustration: traditional banking is slow, opaque, and disconnected from the way people actually manage their money today.
about.storyP2: We set out to build a digital-first banking platform that combines the reliability of traditional finance with the speed and clarity of modern technology.
about.storyP3: Our platform is built on cutting-edge technology, and every piece of data is protected with bank-grade encryption.
about.value1Desc: Every transaction, every data point is protected with industry-standard encryption and rigorous verification processes.
about.value2Desc: No hidden fees, no confusing fine print. You see exactly where your money goes and what every service costs.
about.value3Desc: From account creation to fund transfers, every action is designed to be fast, intuitive, and frustration-free.
about.ctaSubtitle: Open your account today and discover a better way to bank.

contact.title: We're here to help.
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or need support? Reach out and we'll get back to you promptly.
contact.hoursValue:
Mon — Fri: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (EST)
24/7 online dashboard access
contact.name: Your Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successMsg: We'll get back to you within 1 business day.

loanSim.title: Calculate your loan.
loanSim.subtitle: Adjust the amount, duration and interest rate to see your monthly payments and total repayment instantly.
loanSim.successMsg: A confirmation email has been sent to

loanSim.infoCalcDesc: Standard amortization formula. No hidden margins.
loanSim.infoEmailDesc: Receive a detailed breakdown by email immediately.
loanSim.infoReviewDesc: Our team reviews applications within 24 hours.

legal.title: Legal Notices
legal.publisher:

New York, NY 10118
legal.registration: Registered under the laws of the State of Delaware. Company Registration Number: BV-2024-00381.
legal.ip: All content on this platform — including text, graphics, logos, icons, images, and software — is the property of {{platformName}} Inc. and is protected by international copyright laws.
legal.liability: {{platformName}} Inc. makes every effort to ensure accuracy of information. However, {{platformName}} cannot be held responsible for omissions, inaccuracies, or results obtained from misuse of this information.
legal.law: These legal notices are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Delaware.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: {{platformName}} Inc. is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share your personal information.
privacy.collect: We collect information you provide (name, email, date of birth, address, ID documents, selfie, transaction details) and information collected automatically (IP address, browser type, device info, access times).
privacy.use: We use your data to create and manage accounts, process transactions, verify identity (KYC), generate cards, process loans, send notifications, comply with legal obligations, and prevent fraud.
privacy.share: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with regulatory authorities, payment processing partners, identity verification providers, and cloud hosting providers under strict data processing agreements.
privacy.security: We implement 256-bit SSL/TLS encryption, encrypted storage, multi-factor authentication, regular security audits, and role-based access controls.
privacy.rights: You may have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your data. Contact privacy@bankvault.com to exercise these rights.
privacy.contact:
Email: privacy@bankvault.com
Address: {{platformName}} Inc., 350 Fifth Avenue, Suite 3200, New York, NY 10118

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.accept: By using {{platformName}}, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
terms.account: You must be 18+, provide accurate information, and maintain credential security. A unique bank account number is generated on sign-up.
terms.kyc: Certain features require identity verification. Without KYC approval: you may receive funds but cannot send funds, create cards, or manage beneficiaries.
terms.banking: Each user gets one primary bank account. Transfers require balance verification, KYC approval, and administrative review. Virtual VISA and Mastercard cards can be created with individual balances.
terms.locks: Certain transactions may require security codes provided by administrators as additional validation steps.
terms.loans: The loan simulator provides estimates only and does not constitute an offer. All applications are subject to admin review.
terms.prohibited: You may not use the platform for illegal purposes, provide false information, access other accounts, or circumvent security measures.
terms.liability: {{platformName}} shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Total liability shall not exceed fees paid in the preceding 12 months.
terms.law: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, United States.
terms.contact:
Email: legal@bankvault.com
Address: {{platformName}} Inc., 350 Fifth Avenue, Suite 3200, New York, NY 10118
